title: Heart Crystals
description: Adds heart crystals that increase player health.
body:
Adds consumable _Heart Crystals_ which increase player health. They can be crafted with _Heart Crystal Shards_, which are added to the following loot tables:
- Abandodend Mineshaft
- Simple Dungeon
- Buried Treasure
- End City Treasure
- Desert Pyramid
- Jungle Temple
- Woodland Mansion
- Bastion Bridge
- Bastion Treasure
- Bastion Other
